questions.question: Which of the following is a key advantage of WBDF TEM over standard Dark Field TEM?

answers.b: Higher resolution of dislocations and defects
answers.d: Lower electron dose on the sample

questions.question: WBDF TEM is particularly useful for observing:

answers.c: Crystal lattice dislocations and stacking faults

questions.question: The main limitation of HRTEM for imaging heavy-element materials is:

answers.b: Low contrast due to weak phase objects

questions.question: In WBDF imaging, which diffraction condition enhances defect contrast the most?
The key advantage of HAADF-STEM imaging over conventional TEM techniques is:

answers.b: Ability to detect single atoms based on atomic number
